title: Dental plan datasets:  Individuals & families
meta-description: Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The research data below includes stand-alone dental plans available in a given area for each plan year.
bite: Stand-alone dental plans are dental plans that you can buy separately from a Marketplace health plan. These plans can be bought at the same time as a Marketplace health plan. You can get information about the available stand-alone dental plans in a specific area by downloading the links below.
excerpt: Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The research data below includes stand-alone dental plans available in a given area for each plan year.
content:
Stand-alone dental plans are dental plans that you can buy separately from a Marketplace health plan. These plans can be bought at the same time as a Marketplace health plan. You can get information about the available stand-alone dental plans in a specific area by downloading the links below.

2026 stand-alone dental plan data (ZIP file, 17 MB)
2026 instructions (PDF, 171 KB)

2025 instructions (PDF, 156 KB)

2024 instructions (PDF, 163 KB)

2023 instructions (PDF, 155 KB)

2022 instructions (PDF, 157 KB)

2015 plan information is also available for:

  • New Mexico (ZIP file, 161 KB)
  • Nevada (ZIP file, 145 KB)
  • Oregon (ZIP file, 270 KB)

2014 stand-alone dental plan data (ZIP file, 13.7 MB)
2014 instructions (PDF, 284 KB)

2014 plan information is also available for:

  • Idaho (ZIP file, 200 KB)
  • New Mexico (ZIP file, 174 KB)

More resources for:

Researchers
Get more detailed plan information with Health Insurance Marketplace® Public Use Files. These files provide extensive data on the plans available to consumers through the Federally-facilitated Marketplace.

Developers
Access additional dataset files. Get HealthCare.gov data on individual and small group medical and dental plans, as well as Marketplace-certified local help and community provider lists.

Individuals & families
Preview plans & prices before you apply for health coverage.

Small businesses/employers
Preview SHOP plans & prices for small businesses.
